title: session — trait composition
description: Two owned traits — `BelongsToSession` for downstream models carrying a session_id FK (Wave 3+ attendance detail rows, ratings), and `HasSessionAttendance` for the Session model itself.

owned.description: Mixed into downstream models with a session_id FK. Adds session() belongsTo relation + resolveInSession(?Session) query scope with Request::activeSession() fallback. Refuses cross-tenant FK smuggling at save time.
usedBy: Wave 3+ attendance / ratings modules that add per-session rows
composition_notes: The fillOnCreating hook is off by default — session ownership is always explicit.

owned.description: Mixed into the Session model. Exposes attendance() hasMany + checkedInAthletes() / absentAthletes() computed relations + registerAthlete($athleteId) / checkInAthlete($athleteId) / markAbsent($athleteId) mutation helpers routed through the observer.
composition_notes: This trait is ONLY for the Session model.
The mutation helpers route through the observer to preserve capacity + eligibility invariants + denormalised counter updates.

audit.reason: Session mutations are audit-critical; safeguarding-flagged sessions retain regulator-tier.

session.notes: Order matters. BelongsToTenant first. NO BelongsToOrganization — Session cascades organization through branch. NO BelongsToApplication — Sessions do NOT carry application_id.

session_attendance.notes: Pivot row composes BelongsToSession (owned). Does not carry Athlete trait — attendance is session-centric.
